widgetData.source_sentence: A woman wearing all white and eating, walks next to a man holding a briefcase.
sentences: A female is next to a man.
The diners are at a restaurant.

widgetData.source_sentence: A man and a woman cross the street in front of a pizza and gyro restaurant.
sentences: A married couple is sleeping.

Near a couple of restaurants, two people walk across the street.

widgetData.source_sentence: Two women, holding food carryout containers, hug.
sentences: Two women hug each other.

Two adults run across the street to get away from a red shirted person chasing them.

sentences: The woman is waiting for a friend.

A person eating.

widgetData.source_sentence: High fashion ladies wait outside a tram beside a crowd of people in the city.
sentences: The family is sitting down for dinner.
Olympic swimming.
The women do not care what clothes they wear.
